# Current Session

Use `SESSION_TEMPLATE.md` as the structure when updating this file.

## Session Info

- Task: Improve responsive UI and mobile navigation

## Scope

- In scope: make frontend pages easier to use on mobile, add hamburger navigation, and improve workflow panel behavior on small screens
- Out of scope: backend/API behavior changes and desktop feature redesign

## Progress Log

- [x] Added mobile hamburger navigation with slide-out sidebar and overlay
- [x] Added responsive workflow task-panel drawer with mobile controls
